title: mikania eucosma
intro: Mikania eucosma, also known as Wild Lettuce, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mikania eucosma include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Mikania eucosma can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
